text.title: sec-trivy-pinned-supply-chain-scan Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for sec-trivy-pinned-supply-chain-scan as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Bumping the SHA without reviewing release notes or rerunning cosign verification because "Dependabot suggested it."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automated SHA bumps reintroduce the floating-ref risk in slow motion; require a human or agent review of the upstream changelog and signature on every bump.

failure-mode.description: Adding a CVE to .trivyignore with the comment "noisy" and no owner.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The allowlist becomes a perpetual cover; require owner + sunset so review is unavoidable.

failure-mode.description: Generating the SBOM nightly against main rather than against the tagged commit.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The SBOM diverges from any released artifact between two nightly runs and is no longer admissible evidence; pin generation to the tag event.
